title: GL13 9UD, New Earth Solutions (Gloucestershire) Limited: environmental permit surrender issued
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter, decision document and site condition report evaluation template for:   Operator name: New Earth Solutions (Gloucestershire) Limited Installation name: Sharpness IVC Permit number: EPR/FP3490SY/S006  "
